scripts.wasm: cargo build --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release --features wasm && wasm-bindgen ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/energy_core.wasm --out-dir src/pkg --target web
scripts.wasm:manual: cargo build --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release --features wasm && wasm-bindgen ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/energy_core.wasm --out-dir src/pkg --target web
